summary: Live PR inventory shard classified without a shared canonical. No security-sensitive items were detected. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are allowed or safe here; ready/focused or maintainer-owned PRs are routed only for the exact maintainer decisions that remain, while proof-blocked or draft work is kept open.

actions.reason: Focused, apparently useful contributor bug fix with passing proof, but the remaining decision is maintainer technical review; this worker cannot merge or repair it.
Keep open as related follow-up work; proof failure and no-fix/no-merge job permissions block any stronger action.
Maintainer-owned broad compatibility change with mixed check state; exact remaining decision is maintainer review and CI triage, not duplicate cleanup.
Keep open as the related implementation PR for #90049; failing checks and proof requirements block stronger action, and fix/merge are not allowed.
Keep open for the maintainer author; draft status, waiting-on-author label, and needs-changes review make cleanup or closure inappropriate.
